evidence_label: mitapivat minimum-packet readiness gate, not medical advice

source_checks.source_role: Clinical baseline tying TDT interpretation to diagnosis, transfusion, iron, organ, monitoring, HCT, gene manipulation, and disease-modifying therapy context.
Transfusion context baseline for documenting schedule, burden, products, hemoglobin response, and transfusion-safety context.
Iron and organ-risk baseline for ferritin trend, liver iron, cardiac T2*, chelation, and monitoring context.
Adult-label, liver-safety, REMS, and interaction boundary for mitapivat.
Pediatric TDT watchlist record with no posted results in the current check.

packet_domains.minimum_private_evidence: Subtype wording, hemoglobin fraction context, HBB/HBA/HPFH or modifier records when available.
Age band and weight band, not exact birth date or raw growth records.
Generalized transfusion interval, units or volume, body weight, pre/post hemoglobin context, reaction labels, and annual ml/kg/year if clinic-calculated.
Ferritin trend, liver iron, cardiac T2*, chelation identity, and organ-monitoring labels.
Liver test trend and hepatobiliary context labels.
Current medicine categories and interaction-review owner labels.
Owner category labels for regulatory, pharmacy, trial, payer, and affordability constraints.

readiness_decision.rule: One or more required domains is missing or unreviewed.
readiness_decision.blocked_action: Do not ask for a mitapivat decision.

readiness_decision.rule: All seven domains have at least label-level private evidence and no public-release blocker.
readiness_decision.allowed_public_action: Ask the May 17 review-readiness question through the clinician.
readiness_decision.blocked_action: Do not ask for dosing, treatment change, trial screening, import, or access instruction.

readiness_decision.rule: Any domain contains raw identifiers, exact private dates, screenshots, raw messages, or patient-specific instructions.
readiness_decision.blocked_action: Do not publish the domain content.

release_policy: Public artifacts may include domain labels, readiness labels, owner categories, and public source URLs only. Raw records, exact dates, screenshots, names, contact details, doctor messages, owner replies, and patient-specific instructions stay out of Git.
decision_rule: The mitapivat question is allowed only after all seven domains are label-ready and release-checked. This gate does not decide treatment or eligibility.
